title: Jade Feet
description: A mod boost your experience in Jump Boost.
body: Did you think it is irrationality that you will get damage when you fall with Jump Boost?Jade Feet protect all the mobs from the fall damage when they has Jump Boost effect.When a mob has Jump Boost,they won't be hurt when they fall.This mod in order to improve player's gaming experience.This mod only work at Fabric.
